title: The New Fish-Man Pirates Threaten the Crew
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Luffy, Narrator, Zoro, Sanji, Chopper, Franky. The core story beat is the new fish-man pirates threaten the crew.
scene: The scene centers on the new fish-man pirates threaten the crew, with Unknown person #1, Luffy, Narrator, Zoro, Sanji, Chopper, Franky driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's like a cliff of death!!! Are you serious?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is there really a fish- man island down there?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's so hot back there!!! It's too hoot!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And in front, it's pitcher than pitch black!!! There is gonna be more monsters down there for sure!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're never gonna make it back alive Eeee!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: luffy!! This has gotta be the path to hell -

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: --What is that?! there's something up above!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's a rock avalanche!!! Watch out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The eruption just now must have damaged the trench!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll head out of the bubble and slice it up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: luffy, you hold on to me tight!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're already eight thousand metres down!! If you leave the bubble, you'll be crushed by the pressure!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It sprouted into sea- weed!!! You're amazing, USOP!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's only going to slow it down!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: get out of the way while you have the chance, surume!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Indeed!!! Your split-second judgement skills are impeccable!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 10,000 metres under the sea: the depths (bottom of the trench)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...light? Why is there light down here...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: too bright!! My eyes can't handle it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even though I don't have any eyes!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, you guys!! Take a look at this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's so bright I can't make it out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes!! There's no doubt about it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The log post is pointing straight to that island!! That must be...

summary: The New Fish-Man Pirates Threaten the Crew. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
